opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My nose just started gushing blood, and I've soaked through three towels trying to stop it. It's been going for about 45 minutes and it won't stop.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The bleeding won't stop no matter what I try and I'm starting to get really worried about how much blood there is.

symptom_narrative.onset: about 45 minutes ago, right after I blew my nose really hard because it was all blocked up
symptom_narrative.duration: around 45 minutes and still going, though it's slowed a bit
symptom_narrative.character: steady dripping and trickling of bright blood
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: feels like a lot — I've soaked through three towels
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing I've tried has really worked yet
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: the heater's been running hot and my nose has been dry and blocked
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: some blood has gone down the back of my throat and it's making me feel a bit sick
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I get the odd small nosebleed but nothing like this
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can't really do anything, I'm just sitting here holding a towel to my face

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: hay fever — blocked, itchy nose this time of year
past_medical_history.how_managed: just put up with it mostly

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: none — I don't take any regular medicines

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives on my own; the central heating has been running high and the air at home is really dry

objective_data_offered.value: blood still slowly dripping from my right nostril; I've soaked through about three towels
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient self-description over chat; cannot be visually confirmed by the clinician
